gist.headline: Forging new apps
gist.blurb: A new community creation has sprouted! App Forge just landed in the Greenhouse, ready to help you build.
gist.summary: Added the community-built App Forge to the Pollinations app showcase and greenhouse.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore App Forge in our growing directory of community applications.
gist.visual_concept: A blacksmith's forge inside a lush greenhouse, representing 'App Forge' being added to the community 'Greenhouse'. Polly the bee acting as a tiny blacksmith.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny blacksmith apron, hammering a glowing piece of code on a small anvil inside a lush glass greenhouse. Code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots around the forge. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny blacksmith apron, hammering a glowing piece of code on a small anvil inside a lush glass greenhouse. Code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots around the forge. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
